meta_desc: Accessories for open-air cinema: projectors, sound systems, replacement screens, repair kits. Everything you need for a successful event.
hero_desc: Complete your installation with our professional accessories. Headphones, deckchairs, FM transmitters, inflatable furniture, projection booths and complete audiovisual packages.
a1_desc: Headphones for all Hallucine events, outdoor cinema. Get an amazing sound experience for your body and soul. Ideal for silent screenings and events in residential areas.
a2_desc: Relax and be comfortable while watching movies and sports games with friends and family. Our deckchairs are designed for comfort during long outdoor screenings.
a3_desc: Reach people in nearby vehicles. Deliver exceptional sounds in real time for a drive-in cinema experience. Perfect for drive-in theaters and events.
a4_desc: Easy to inflate, with an excellent anti-deflation design. These extremely durable sofas are suitable for you, your family and friends for any Hallucine event.
a5_desc: The projection booth works perfectly with Hallucine's inflatable screens. Place your projector directly and make sure it's safe for amazing video effects.
a6_desc: From 50 to over 400 people, whatever the size of your event, you can offer your audience a stunning audio and video experience. Complete packages including projector, sound and accessories.
forfaits_desc: Our AV packages are designed to suit all event sizes. Each package includes projection equipment, sound system and accessories.
f1_desc: HD projector, compact sound system, suitable screen. Ideal for private parties and small gatherings.
f2_desc: High-brightness projector, amplified sound, medium to large screen. For community and corporate events.
f3_desc: Professional projector, concert sound, giant screen. For festivals, drive-ins and large gatherings.
cta_desc: Contact us to put together the perfect package for your event.
